items.claim: Abdul Hussein has finished all but one of his professional wins.
items.quote: he has finished all but one of his wins.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein held his own in the grappling against Muhammad Mokaev.
items.quote: he was holding his own in the in the grappling against Muhammad Mia.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking the fight on short notice and flying to Abu Dhabi.
items.quote: Cody Gibson, who's taken this fight in short notice, flying all the way to Abu Dhabi

items.claim: Cody Gibson is coming off back-to-back finish losses and is 38 years old.
items.quote: coming off backto back finish losses, 38 years old at this point

items.claim: Cody Gibson has taken a ton of damage throughout his career and been submitted a handful of times.
items.quote: taking a ton of damage throughout his career. He's been submitted a handful of times.
